CREATE TABLE geo_points (point_id UInt64, lon Float64, lat Float64);
SELECT geoDistance(lon, lat, 34.0522, -118.2437) AS distance FROM geo_points WHERE point_id = 1;
SELECT geoDistance(lon, lat, lon2, lat2) AS distance FROM geo_points CROSS JOIN (SELECT 34.0522 AS lon2, -118.2437 AS lat2) AS second_point;
SELECT AVG(geoDistance(lon, lat, lon2, lat2)) AS avg_distance FROM geo_points CROSS JOIN (SELECT lon AS lon2, lat AS lat2 FROM geo_points WHERE point_id != 1) AS second_points;

SELECT geoDistance(lon1.ln, lat1.lt, lon2.ln, lat2.lt) AS distance FROM (SELECT lon AS ln, lat AS lt FROM geo_points WHERE point_id = 1) AS lon1, (SELECT lon AS ln, lat AS lt FROM geo_points WHERE point_id = 2) AS lon2;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM geo_points WHERE geoDistance(lon, lat, 34.0522, -118.2437) < 10000;
SELECT geoDistance(longitude, latitude, 0, 0) AS distance FROM (SELECT lon AS longitude, lat AS latitude FROM geo_points) AS subquery WHERE distance < 5000;
